allow: Bash("/c/Program Files/GitHub CLI/gh.exe" issue list --repo johtani/smarthome --state open --limit 50)
Bash("/c/Program Files/GitHub CLI/gh.exe" label list --repo johtani/smarthome)
Bash("/c/Program Files/GitHub CLI/gh.exe" label create "priority: high" --repo johtani/smarthome --description "緊急度・重要度が高い" --color "B60205")
Bash("/c/Program Files/GitHub CLI/gh.exe" label create "priority: medium" --repo johtani/smarthome --description "重要度が中程度" --color "E4E669")
Bash("/c/Program Files/GitHub CLI/gh.exe" label create "priority: low" --repo johtani/smarthome --description "優先度が低い・nice-to-have" --color "0E8A16")
